# Frontend Areas

## Primary Entry Points

- `index.html`
- `products.html`
- `accessweb.html`
- `dashboar.html`
- `admin-products.html`
- `admin-customers.html`
- `admin-orders.html`
- `offline.html`

## Styling Layout

- `css/abstracts/`
- `css/base/`
- `css/components/`
- `css/layout/`
- `css/pages/`
- `css/themes/`

## Frontend Logic

- `js/modules/core/`
- `js/modules/pages/`
- `js/modules/ui/`
- `js/modules/utils/`

## Frontend Principles

- Preserve root navigation stability
- Prefer focused changes over broad rewrites
- Validate build safety when touching entrypoints or modules
